name: gstack
description: Garry's Stack — Claude Code skills + fast headless browser. One repo, one install, entire AI engineering workflow.

scripts.build: bun build --compile browse/src/cli.ts --outfile browse/dist/browse && bun build --compile browse/src/find-browse.ts --outfile browse/dist/find-browse && git rev-parse HEAD > browse/dist/.version && rm -f .*.bun-build
